name: D+Q idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis randomized feasibility and tolerability pilot
summary: Phase 1 randomized, single-blind, single-center pilot trial in which 12 participants with idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis were randomized 1:1 to dasatinib 100 mg/day plus quercetin 1250 mg/day for 3 consecutive days per week over 3 weeks or matching placebo.

provenance.note: Abstract reports 12 participants, 1:1 randomization, D+Q dose, schedule, and matching placebo comparator.
